license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.efmbbk6
title: The influence of agricultural tillage practices on soil biodiversity: Sequence analysis
author: Robert Hanner

steps_raw.instruction: Primer removal : Primers were trimmed from the raw reads using Cutadapt cutadapt Linux https://github.com/marcelm/cutadapt/ Marcel Martin
Read processing: The UPARSE pipeline was chosen to quality filter and cluster all reads
Quality filter fastq_filter -fastq_maxee 1 trim all reads to a common length for each gene
Label samples : sample labels were added to each sequence header with -relabel command
ITS2 extraction : For ITS2, the program ITSx was used to extract the ITS2 region from flanking 5.8S
OTU table construction : map all sample labelled reads onto OTU file for each gene
Used BLAST to identify all OTUs against the SILVA_123 (16S, 18S, AMF), UNITE (ITS2) and Genbank (CO1)
Used MEGAN5 to pick most correct ID using LCA algorith (LCA% 75)
Map tax ids onto OTUS in table format search_exact (UPARSE)
Statistical analysis : load OTU table with tax ids into STAMP (program)
